reviews.comment:
Cargue rapido combustible,se hace cola desde la esquina,peligroso cuando cruzas las diagonales para seguir la fila,malisimo el acceso   nivel de piso y calle entrecortado por cordoncuneta,si no te fijas bien rayas las llantas o algun golpesito

(Translated by Google)
Fill up quickly, the line starts at the corner, it's dangerous when you cross the diagonals to continue the line, the access is terrible at ground level and the street is interrupted by the curb, if you're not careful you'll scratch your tires or get a small dent
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURocmIzRUtREAE

reviews.comment:
A tener en cuenta  que deben hacer fila y esperar ser llamados  para ingresar al playon para cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
Please note that you must queue and wait to be called to enter the parking area to refuel.

Le pongo 5 , Por que son lo mas, atentos , responsables ,y dinamicos al atender!! Al turista ! Mas alla que tengo mi corazon en Mirqmqr ..!!

(Translated by Google)
